# EduLink CRM - Netlify Deployment

This folder contains the static build of EduLink CRM System ready for Netlify deployment.

## 📦 Contents

- `index.html` - Main landing page
- `_redirects` - Netlify routing configuration
- `_next/static/` - Static assets (CSS, JS, images)

## 🚀 Deploy to Netlify

### Method 1: Netlify Drop (Easiest)
1. Go to https://app.netlify.com/drop
2. Drag and drop this entire `dist` folder
3. Get your live URL instantly!

### Method 2: Netlify CLI
```bash
# Install Netlify CLI
npm install -g netlify-cli

# Deploy
cd dist
netlify deploy --prod
```

### Method 3: Git Integration
1. Push this `dist` folder to GitHub
2. Connect repo to Netlify
3. Auto-deploy on every push

## 📋 Features Included

- ✅ Modern blue/white CRM UI
- ✅ Responsive design
- ✅ Contact Management
- ✅ Sales Pipeline
- ✅ Task Management
- ✅ Analytics Dashboard
- ✅ Authentication system
- ✅ Add Contact/Deal/Task modals
